entity: 1987 NBA Draft #1 overall pick: David Robinson (SAN; 'The Admiral', two-time NBA champion, 1994-95 MVP)
notes: David Robinson was the #1 pick out of the Naval Academy; he fulfilled his two-year military service commitment before joining the Spurs in 1989. SAN is the era-matched abbreviation for the 1987 San Antonio Spurs (current era is SAS).
